creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Maintainer update of mail/mutt:

	- Enable staging, simplifying the port, especially the PLIST code
	- Make port work with installed db6 for header caches

Committer: New files (svn add): files/patch-staging-Makefile.am	pkg-plist
	   Removed files (svn rm): files/extra-patch-doc-xml files/extra-patch-no-mbox-manpage files/extra-patch-nodoc-contrib files/extra-patch-nodoc-mailbox-contrib scripts/generate-plist scripts/
